claim: The binding orientation of the ML-SA1 activator at hTRPML2 is similar to the binding orientation of the ML-SA1 activator at hTRPML1.

result.claim: The binding orientation of the ML-SA1 activator at hTRPML2 is similar to the binding orientation of the ML-SA1 activator at hTRPML1.
result.reasoning: The knowledge base was searched for propositions and chunks related to the binding orientation of ML-SA1 at hTRPML2 and hTRPML1. No direct evidence was found to support or refute the claim that their binding orientations are similar. The search results were largely unrelated to the specific proteins and their binding characteristics.

evidence.text: Pigment Dispersing Factor is an M-oscillator neurotransmitter.
evidence.source: Neural Network Interactions Modulate CRY-Dependent Photoresponses in Drosophila

evidence.text: Polyglutamine binding protein 1 (PQBP1) emerged as a strong candidate in the analysis.
evidence.source: PQBP1 Is a Proximal Sensor of the cGAS-Dependent Innate Response to HIV-1

evidence.text: Δ9-THCV interacts with CB1 receptors when administered in vivo.
evidence.source: The diverse CB1 and CB2 receptor pharmacology of three plant cannabinoids: Δ9-tetrahydrocannabinol, cannabidiol and Δ9-tetrahydrocannabivarin

evidence.text: Gas6 is a ligand for a family of tyrosine kinase receptors known as the TAM (Tyro3, Axl, and Mertk) receptors.
evidence.source: The TAM receptor Tyro3 regulates myelination in the central nervous system

evidence.text: Phosphorylation regulates the binding activity of motor proteins.

evidence.text: The conformational change resulting from ligand engagement of TCR-CD3 results in recruitment of the adaptor protein Nck.

evidence.text: TrkB activation depends on NMDAR and CaMKII signalling.

evidence.text: Nac1 directly binds to the c-Myc promoter and regulates c-Myc transcription.

evidence.text: SGK1 further participates in the regulation of the transcription factors nuclear factor kappa-B NFκB, p53, cAMP responsive element binding protein (CREB), activator protein-1, and forkhead transcription factor FKHR-L1 (FOXO3a).
evidence.source: Two Liters a Day Keep the Doctor Away? Considerations on the Pathophysiology of Suboptimal Fluid Intake in the Common Population

evidence.text: Δ9-THCV can behave either as a CB1 antagonist or a CB1 receptor agonist.
evidence.source: The diverse CB1 and CB2 receptor pharmacology of three plant cannabinoids: Δ9-tetrahydrocannabinol, cannabidiol and Δ9-tetrahydrocannabivarin

evidence.text: Nitric oxide synthase (NOS) can bind to target proteins.

evidence.text: SOD1 binds a C-terminal degron identified in Yck1p/Yck2p.
